title: CraftEditor
description: CraftEditor allows server owners to create, edit, and manage Minecraft crafting recipes directly in-game through a simple and intuitive graphical interface, without configuration files or server restarts.
body:
# CraftEditor

**CraftEditor** is a Minecraft plugin for **1.21+ servers** (Paper and Spigot) that allows server owners and admins to **create, edit, and manage custom crafting recipes directly in-game**.

This plugin is **free to use** and was developed by **Belyxzor**. It does **not contain malware, viruses, or harmful code**. CraftEditor follows all Modrinth Content Rules and respects Minecraft's EULA.
![In-Game Recipe Creator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kseLAfIu/images/a43e78d0c23960d5bb6cdc988a7935d069b5f113.png)

---

## Features

- Create custom recipes by placing items in a crafting grid  
- Validate recipes instantly without editing configuration files or restarting the server  
- Modify or delete recipes at any time  
- View all custom recipes through a clean, intuitive GUI  
- Integrates seamlessly with vanilla crafting  
- Lightweight and optimized  
- Beginner-friendly and easy to use  
- Perfect for SMP, survival, and custom gameplay servers  
- No server restart required  

---

## Commands

- `/craft` – Open the recipe menu for players  
- `/crafteditor` – Open admin commands menu  
- `/crafteditor create` – Create a new custom recipe  
- `/crafteditor delete <name>` – Delete a custom recipe  
- `/crafteditor reload` – Reload all recipes  
- `/crafteditor list` – List all custom recipes  

---

## Permissions

- `crafteditor.use` – Access the recipe menu  
- `crafteditor.admin` – Create, edit, delete, and reload recipes  

---

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21+  
- Paper / Spigot servers  

---

CraftEditor is designed to **simplify crafting management**, giving server owners **full control** over their server’s recipes while keeping everything **fast, simple, and safe**.
